properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 91/16
ANDOYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT ROCKET FIRINGS IN THE AREA OUTSIDE ANDOYA IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM 31 AUG TO 02 SEP BETWEEN 1800 AND 2400 LOCAL TIME.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA DURING THE ANNOUNCED PERIODS.

DANGER AREA: 
A. 69-01.8N 015-29.7E
B. 69-03.5N 014-32,0E 
C. 69-29.0N 014-32.0E 
D. 69-29.0N 015-45.5E 
E. 69-11.6N 015-49.6E
F. 69-01.8N 015-29.7E

REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 15 AND 16/16
